message:
fix: warn when --reply-to thread lookup fails instead of silent fallthrough (gt-n3yh9)

The --reply-to flag on gt mail send silently swallowed errors when looking up the
original message for thread ID. This caused new thread IDs to be generated without
any user feedback, breaking threading. Now emits warnings to stderr so the user
knows when threading will be broken.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
